revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-185

No English term

Term describing equality of loudness of the auditory sensations produced by several sounds or noises of different character, under given conditions.

Reference: C.E.F.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Equality of Laudness}}
